'''âp-s-p-w''' ('''kapaspewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fond|fond]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fond|fond]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-s-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapaspewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaspewoko|thipaspewoko]] || [[word:jipaspewoko|jipaspewoko]] || [[word:shipaspewoko|shipaspewoko]] || [[word:kipaspewoko|kipaspewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupaspewoko|thuthupaspewoko]] || [[word:jujupaspewoko|jujupaspewoko]] || [[word:shushupaspewoko|shushupaspewoko]] || [[word:kukupaspewoko|kukupaspewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupaspewoko|thupaspewoko]] || [[word:jupaspewoko|jupaspewoko]] || [[word:shupaspewoko|shupaspewoko]] || [[word:kupaspewoko|kupaspewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupaspewoko|thupaspewoko]] || [[word:jupaspewoko|jupaspewoko]] || [[word:shupaspewoko|shupaspewoko]] || [[word:kupaspewoko|kupaspewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepaspewoko|thepaspewoko]] || [[word:jepaspewoko|jepaspewoko]] || [[word:shepaspewoko|shepaspewoko]] || [[word:kepaspewoko|kepaspewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopaspewoko|thothopaspewoko]] || [[word:jojopaspewoko|jojopaspewoko]] || [[word:shoshopaspewoko|shoshopaspewoko]] || [[word:kokopaspewoko|kokopaspewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopaspewoko|thopaspewoko]] || [[word:jopaspewoko|jopaspewoko]] || [[word:shopaspewoko|shopaspewoko]] || [[word:kopaspewoko|kopaspewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaspewoko|thopaspewoko]] || [[word:jopaspewoko|jopaspewoko]] || [[word:shopaspewoko|shopaspewoko]] || [[word:kopaspewoko|kopaspewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚpaspewoko|thĂŚpaspewoko]] || [[word:jĂŚpaspewoko|jĂŚpaspewoko]] || [[word:shĂŚpaspewoko|shĂŚpaspewoko]] || [[word:kĂŚpaspewoko|kĂŚpaspewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapaspewoko|thathapaspewoko]] || [[word:jajapaspewoko|jajapaspewoko]] || [[word:shashapaspewoko|shashapaspewoko]] || [[word:kakapaspewoko|kakapaspewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapaspewoko|thapaspewoko]] || [[word:japaspewoko|japaspewoko]] || [[word:shapaspewoko|shapaspewoko]] || [[word:kapaspewoko|kapaspewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapaspewoko|thapaspewoko]] || [[word:japaspewoko|japaspewoko]] || [[word:shapaspewoko|shapaspewoko]] || [[word:kapaspewoko|kapaspewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
